response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — core requirements for this role. Their background is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only superficial Java exposure in early roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE tooling work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer education
Extensive background in dev-ops, CI/CD, and system architecture
concerns: No evidence of Java/Kotlin or JVM tooling expertise beyond basic usage
Lacks experience with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise application servers
IDE internals and language tooling focus is absent from resume
